subject: WSJ Newsletter: AI market signals
body_text: AI automation startups are attracting venture interest as enterprises look for agent workflows. Semiconductor shares moved after new market guidance. A founder launched a company focused on browser automation for operational teams.

subject: WSJ Newsletter: chip supply and enterprise budgets
body_text: Enterprise software buyers are scrutinizing AI infrastructure spend while demand for inference capacity remains strong. Chip suppliers discussed capacity constraints and cloud customers shifted budgets toward automation projects.
